text:
Created attachment 163379
fusefs-mp3fs.diff

A new Version of mp3fs is available.
Actual Version is 0.91, port has 0.9.

My old e-mail address isn't valid anymore, so i changed it to my new one.

I'm not sure if the PORTEPOCH line in the Makefile is still necessary. If not, please remove it.

I have tested it on 9.3-RELEASE and 10.2-RELEASE.

Fix: Patch with patch -p0 < fusefs-mp3fs.diff
